item.title: Partial Confessions Helped Solve Her Case
item.description: A case was solved after decades, with partial confessions playing a key role in the investigation.

item.title: A Husband’s Case Raises Serious Questions
item.description: A factual look at a husband’s case and the questions it raises, focusing on the investigation and what remains unclear.

item.title: Inside the Unsolved Hinterkaifeck Case
item.description: A look at the unsolved Hinterkaifeck case, exploring the timeline, key questions, and why it remains a subject of public interest.

media:content.media:description: A look at the unsolved Hinterkaifeck case, exploring the timeline, key questions, and why it remains a subject of public interest.

item.title: Captured on Her Bike Ride Home
item.description: A factual look at the case surrounding a woman captured while riding her bike home, with focus on the timeline and investigation.
